name: itr-credential-generation
description: ITR Credentials Generation Automation — Take-Home Assignment

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVICE,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix service" "npm run dev --prefix ui"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix shared && npm run build --prefix service && npm run build --prefix automation
scripts.test:all: npm run test:service && npm run test:automation
